art_market.summary: March 22, 2026, marks the end of a busy week in Seoul's art scene, with several major exhibitions concluding today.
closing_today: Artist Research: Unfinished Flora & Time Blooms (Buk-Seoul Museum of Art)
ongoing: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center (until June 28)
Form into Color by March Avery at Esther Schipper (until April 25)
Park Chan-kyong: Zen Master Eyeball at Kukje Gallery (until May 10)
Kim Yun-shin Retrospective at Hoam Museum of Art (until June 28)
Damien Hirst Retrospective at MMCA Seoul (Ongoing)

stock_market.summary: The market is closed for the weekend. Analyzing the previous week: The KOSPI closed at 5,781.2 on Friday, March 20, amid continued volatility driven by Middle East geopolitical risks. Despite the instability, individual investor demand remains high. The outlook for the coming week (starting March 24) is projected between 5,500 and 6,100 points.

key_indicators.Market_Sentiment: Cautious; high volatility due to geopolitical tensions.
key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Geopolitical risks, individual investor net-buying trends, Q1 earnings focus.
